description: Splunk is helping to build a safer and more resilient digital world by equipping customers with the unified security and observability platform they need to keep their organization securely up and running — no matter what digital disruptions come their way.
description_enriched: Splunk is a platform that enables organizations around the world to prevent major issues, absorb shocks, and accelerate digital transformation.
description_metadata_raw: Splunk is the key to enterprise resilience. Our platform enables organizations around the world to prevent major issues, absorb shocks and accelerate digital transformation.

company_updates.description:
In the Public Sector, agencies are looking to drive greater efficiency without sacrificing the resiliency that missions demand.

That's where thoughtful AI application and automation come in. Explore how strategic AI investments will help teams cut noise, spot risks, and act with confidence on #SplunkBlogs: https://splk.it/3XETWQR

When Splunk users say "just do it," that's the kind of confidence that matters.

Real security professionals are sharing the impact that Splunk Enterprise Security has made on their risk-based alerting and custom dashboards. Take a look on PeerSpot 👉 https://splk.it/4iLO16m #SplunkSecurity

🚀 Lust auf frische Insights zu Innovation, Wachstum und Observability?

Brian Berg (Accenture) sowie Robert Lukaseder und Tommy Z. (Splunk) zeigen im LinkedIn Live Talk, wie Unternehmen mit moderner Observability durchstarten können: praxisnah, verständlich und auf den Punkt.

Jetzt anmelden, Platz sichern und dabei sein!

#SplunkO11y

Observability is now a business catalyst — not just an uptime metric. 📈

Join leaders from Splunk, TSYS, and TIAA on December 11 as they unpack key findings from the State of Observability 2025 report and share how modern observability, AI, and OpenTelemetry are driving real business impact.

You don't want to miss these insights. 👉 https://splk.it/44aGnMK #SplunkO11y

More data doesn't mean better security. Without context, it just means more noise. 🔍

Modern threats aren't always logged; they're embedded in how your systems behave. Security and observability need to work together to surface the signals that matter and connect the dots before it's too late.

Read more in Perspectives by Splunk. 👉 https://splk.it/445zKv0

Is observability your secret weapon for innovation or just another IT buzzword?

Join us LIVE as we shake up the conversation with Frank Schwarzenau from Amazon Web Services (AWS) and our own Stephane Estevez! 

They’ll unpack the latest insights from Splunk’s State of Observability 2025 research and reveal how top organisations are turning observability into real business results. 

Secure your virtual front-row seat register now!

#SplunkO11y
Resilience Talks: État de l’observabilité en 2025

In security operations, every second counts. Splunk Enterprise Security 8 delivers up to 2x faster API calls and 25% faster UI loading, helping analysts respond quicker to threats. Drive these performance gains and more with insight from Splunk Lantern: https://splk.it/4rBLI9J

Against the backdrop of #AWSreInvent's focus on cloud innovation, our very own Hao Yang and Amazon Web Services (AWS)'s Bill Fine are exploring how our longstanding strategic collaboration enables organizations to unlock the full potential of their data, models, and operations. 

Head to #SplunkBlogs to learn how, together, we're accelerating AI success and building resilient, intelligent systems for the future: https://splk.it/4rFjTxy

We love a seamless workflow - especially when it comes wrapped in advanced AI and automation capabilities from Splunk and Amazon Web Services (AWS). 🎁

This week at #AWSreInvent, we're unwrapping new integrations that are designed to activate your Splunk data wherever it lives. 

Goodbye friction, and hello proactive operations. See more on #SplunkBlogs: https://splk.it/3KkD3rD

AI isn't just changing technology. It's redefining how organizations operate. 

On Perspectives by Splunk, Splunk Field CTO Keith McClellan breaks down how today’s leaders can reimagine team design, collaboration, and innovation in the age of AI. ⬇️

Big updates for Dashboard Studio dropped at #splunkconf25! 🚀 

#ICYMI: Here's your quick catch-up. ⬇️

New features like conditional panel visibility, token eval, custom visualizations, and natively supported timeline visualizations are now available, and aim to help you build dashboards that respond to user choices and show exactly what's needed.

Find out more on #SplunkBlogs.

Survival tips for #AWSreInvent? Hydrate, caffeinate, and locate Splunk. (Hint, hint, we'll be with Cisco at booth 1320.)

Stop by for the inside scoop on the latest observability insights, security innovations, and AI offerings. Plus, your new favorite Splunk t-shirt will be waiting for you.

Get more details here: https://splk.it/3WVbsA0

Less setup. More insight.

We're excited to share our latest donation to the OpenTelemetry project, OpenTelemetry Injector. This tool takes the hassle out of telemetry setup, helping teams instrument faster and smarter with no code edits needed.

Our very own Morgan McLean shares more on The New Stack. #SplunkO11y

We’re proud to share that we’ve been named a 2025 Microsoft Americas Partner of the Year Finalist in the Software Development Company category! 

This recognition is a true testament to how we’re helping customers build greater digital resilience, together. Find out more.👇 #SplunkPartners

AI is speeding up security, but trust still needs human oversight. 

Our own Tanya Faddoul and Michael Fanning highlight how to balance harnessing the potential of AI without adding risk.

Read more on VentureBeat.👇 #SplunkSecurity

1,855 observability professionals. One clear message: It's time to evolve. 💡

Our own Greg Leffler shares how teams are collaborating with security, navigating AI complexity, and driving measurable business value in this new era.

Download our State of Observability 2025 report to learn more. 👉 https://splk.it/4hWUef1 #SplunkO11y
Struggling to understand the full picture of your multi-step customer transactions? Discover how to get deep insights with Splunk AppDynamics over on Splunk Lantern: https://splk.it/43bnE2Y

AI hype is easy. AI readiness is the real flex. 💪

Join Cisco and Splunk to learn how to operationalize AI, secure your systems, and scale responsibly.

See where we're headed next, and secure your spot. 🔗 https://splk.it/4oCvTh6

AI is changing the game for defenders — are you ready to keep up? 

Tune in live on November 20 to hear Forrester and Splunk experts share how security teams are using AI and unified platforms to outsmart evolving threats and boost resilience.

Save your spot: https://splk.it/4qWlz5h 📅 #SplunkSecurity

It’s the most wonderful time of the year…#AWSreInvent season, of course! 

Heading to Las Vegas this December? See where to catch up with us and learn how Splunk powers digital resilience in the AI era. 👀 https://splk.it/4qP0wBz

Top performers don't just work harder. They work smarter. 📊

Our State of Observability 2025 report found that teams using forward-leaning technology are 2x more likely to significantly improve productivity, revenue, and product roadmaps.

See what else sets observability leaders apart. 👀 https://splk.it/4p0OFPi #SplunkO11y

Veterans in cybersecurity are just built different. 💪

Call it their sixth sense, but they show up quietly, decisively, and with an instinct for risk that you just can't fake.

Our own Mick Baccio shares why veterans are a serious competitive advantage on Perspectives by Splunk.

As cyber threats evolve, so should your defense. ⚔️

On November 20, our own Michael Grenetz and Forrester’s Jeff Pollard will break down how #AI and unified SecOps platforms give defenders the speed and smarts to stay ahead.

RSVP now. 📆 https://splk.it/4oJctYh #SplunkSecurity

If Tenable Web App Scanning (WAS) is part of your web application security strategy, you're going to want to check out this Splunk Lantern article to learn how to effectively pinpoint and address web application security flaws. Dive in here: https://splk.it/4om4X4D

🚀 Ready to turn AI potential into performance with Cisco and Splunk?

Good news - we're hitting the road to share how your organization can move from AI experimentation to trusted enterprise deployment.

Get practical guidance on how to:
🔹 Build resilient AI operations
🔹 Secure and govern AI systems
🔹 Overcome infrastructure and data challenges
🔹 Capture real business value from AI innovation

See where we'll be and save your spot. ➡️ https://splk.it/47HPWUo

Observability has officially entered the boardroom. 💡

Our State of Observability 2025 report reveals that organizations that embrace observability as a strategic discipline see 125% annual ROI and major gains in productivity and revenue.

Yep, Techstrong.IT has the scoop on how observability is shaping the future of AI-driven business - take a look. #SplunkO11y

Why is it important for an organization to have Observability in their AI Infrastructure?

I had a blast chatting with Patrick Lin, SVP and GM of Observability at Splunk on The Ravit Show. We get straight into how teams keep AI reliable and how leaders turn telemetry into business results.

What we cover:
	•	.conf25 updates in Splunk Observability
	•	AI Agentic Monitoring and AI Infrastructure Monitoring
	•	How a unified experience with Splunk AppDynamics and Splunk Observability Cloud helps teams ship faster with fewer surprises
	•	Why observability is now a growth lever, not just a safety net
	•	Fresh insights from the State of Observability 2025 report

My take:
	•	The nervous system of AI is observability
	•	Signal quality beats signal volume
	•	OpenTelemetry works best when tied to business context
	•	When SecOps and Observability work together, incidents become learning moments

If you care about reliable AI, faster recovery, and clear impact on productivity and revenue, this one will help.

Full interview below in the comments.

#data #ai #conf2025 #splunk #splunkconf25 #SplunkSponsored #theravitshow

From tool sprawl to alert overload and beyond, it's no secret that security teams are facing more challenges than ever. But leading SOCs are fighting back with #AI, automation, and unified platforms. 💪

Join our own Kirsty Paine and HubSpot’s Alyssa Robinson tomorrow for a live discussion on how to transform your security operations from overwhelmed to optimized, plus key insights from our State of Security 2025 report.

Save your spot here: https://splk.it/4oMap12 #SplunkSecurity

What if your model could classify new threats without being trained on them first?

With Splunk and Foundation-Sec-8B, you can apply labels with one SPL command. That's right, no fine-tuning and no delays - just define your labels and let the model do the work. 

Explore more on #SplunkBlogs.

Splunk has been named a Leader in the 2025 Magic Quadrant for SIEM for now the 11th consecutive time! This one feels extra special due to the all of the partnership that we have been building between Splunk Global Security and our Products org. I've never seen a product and security org work like this before, and have the opportunity to have our folks influence and drive forward tangible features that make it easier to detect and respond! Can't wait to show off all of the awesome stuff that we have coming up too! 

https://lnkd.in/g-_tiPt8

Breaking into one of tech's fastest-moving, high-pressure industries isn’t easy, but our own Audra Streetman is proof it’s possible.

From imposter syndrome to gender bias, she shares her journey from "ground zero" to cybersecurity leadership in this epsiode of Expert Insights' Women in Cyber podcast.

And we've gotta say, it's perfect #CyberSecurityAwarenessMonth inspo - check it out here! #SplunkSecurity
https://lnkd.in/eEebHtZt
company_updates.reshared_post_description:
🎙️ Episode 2: Breaking Into Cybersecurity 🎙️

For the second episode of the Women In Cyber series, Caitlin Harris (Jones) is joined by Audra Streetman, Senior Threat Intelligence Analyst, Splunk and Olga Polishchuk 🇺🇦, Vice President of Investigations, ZeroFox. 

Not everyone's path into cybersecurity looks the same. This week's episode explores the diverse, non-traditional routes of breaking into the field, including:

💡How to get hired
💡The benefits of cross skilling
💡Navigating a fast paced, high stakes industry
💡And the importance of diversity within a successful team

🎧 Listen to the full episode via the link in this post

#womenincyber #cybercareers

Splunk has once again been named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)! Find out how we’re helping security teams stay ahead in today’s rapidly evolving threat landscape. ➡️ https://splk.it/4nVpPQC 

#SplunkSecurity

We're turning up the heat on AI-powered cybersecurity. 🔥

That's right — agentic AI is landing in #SplunkSecurity to bring detection, investigation, and response into a single, intuitive workspace. Say goodbye to tool overload and hello to faster, smarter defenses — with humans still in command. 

More from #splunkconf25 on IT Brew.

In a world where verifying the server alone isn't enough, enter Mutual TLS (mTLS) the latest addition in Splunk Enterprise 10.0.

Built across 10 key communication paths — forwarders, HEC, search heads, indexers, and more, mTLS is making secure connections easier than ever. 

Get all the details on #SplunkBlogs. #SplunkSecurity

Who says observability can’t be fun? 🎮 

At .conf25, the Splunk Arcade turned retro gaming into a hands-on workshop for real-world learning. From flying high in the Flight Simulator with Greg Leffler to diving into data-driven missions, Cory Minton shows how Splunk brings learning to the next level: https://splk.it/4oj5iFi #splunkconf25

What happens when you blend a startup mindset with enterprise muscle?

Our very own Kamal Hathi sat down with iTWire to share how Splunk is transforming from within. With a focus on unified data, platform acceleration, and enterprise clarity powered by AI, he explains how product innovation and realignment are leading the way. ⬇️

Ready to take your cloud game to the next level? ☁️

Join us tomorrow for a hands-on, half-day virtual workshop with Amazon Web Services (AWS) packed with expert insights, live demos, and real strategies to help you wrangle hybrid infrastructure, conquer data chaos, and stay ahead of evolving security risks.

📅 Tuesday, October 14 | 8–11AM PDT
💻 Save your spot now: https://splk.it/4ojqfAe

#SplunkPartners

What happens when Splunk, REPAY - Realtime Electronic Payments, and The Futurum Group get together for #CXDay?

An expert-led conversation on delivering customer success at the speed our customers need. Catch the full LinkedIn Live here: https://splk.it/4ocZ4qz

I had a blast at .conf25 2025 by Splunk and an on-site interview I recorded with Lizzy Li, Principal PM for dashboards at Splunk. I spent time at the Data Visualizations area to understand how teams bring Splunk data to life for investigations and exec reviews. Lizzy walked me through three layers:

- Splunk UI Toolkit for reusable UI components so internal teams and developers can build apps faster

- The dashboard framework and visualizations that power charts across the Splunk portfolio and let developers create custom experiences

- Dashboard Studio, the general purpose tool most customers use to build and share dashboards

What stood out:

- Flexibility. Customers are not limited to charts in a grid. Think floor plans, architecture diagrams, and network maps that match real-world layouts

- One view of more data. Dashboard Studio can bring together logs, observability metrics, and with federation, external data sources

- Scale and performance. Tabs let you pack multiple dashboards into one, and performance updates keep large numbers of charts responsive

- New this year. More advanced logic and the ability to show or hide panels dynamically so analysts can tailor the view during an investigation

If you care about clear, flexible dashboards that can handle real-world complexity, you will like this conversation. Full interview is below.

#splunkconf25 #SplunkSponsored #data #ai #theravitshow

It's a new era for Splunk and Cisco.

We're powering and protecting the AI revolution – and our newest innovations unveiled at #splunkconf25 highlight how.

Read on as our own Kamal Hathi shares a closer look at how we're unlocking the potential for AI with machine data and advanced digital resilience into the Agentic era: https://splk.it/46aB2GD
We’re incredibly proud to celebrate our very own Kirsty Paine for her recognition in the 2025 Tech Ascension Awards. Cheers to you, Kirsty, on this outstanding achievement! 👏

These award winners exemplify the leadership required to steer organizations through disruption, growth, and transformation in the age of AI and digital innovation.

company_updates.description:
Heading to #GartnerSYM? We’ll see you there! 

Get ready to discover why Cisco is the critical infrastructure for the AI era, helping organizations connect, protect, and scale in an AI-driven world. Get more details here: https://splk.it/4gZcFzj

Friday night lights? Try Splunk Stadium lights. 🏈

Our own Cory Minton and Tim McIntosh teamed up at #splunkconf25 to showcase our Fantasy Football Prediction Engine and prove what's possible when AI + ML call the plays.

Check it out here. 👉 https://splk.it/4o4g1TT

Join us on CX Day as we celebrate the good things that happen when customer experience is at the heart of every strategy, and discover how Splunk and Cisco are investing in the success of our global community.

Splunk is proud to champion CX Day by reaffirming that Customer Success is our number one priority. We are committed to delivering exceptional experiences for our customers, partners, and employees through world-class Customer Success teams and innovative programs. Our ongoing investments drive superior business outcomes—ensuring our customers receive greater value and achieve higher returns on their technology investments.


Success, to us, means enabling our customers to align products and services with their long-term business objectives. Influential voices like CSX expert Tiffani Bova highlight how better customer experiences drive better business outcomes across all industries. Our customers, such as Repay, exemplify this “recipe for success”—combining Splunk’s leading technology with dedicated Customer Success partnerships to maximize ROI.

Wake up, folks - it's #CXDay! 

Tune in at 11am PT for a conversation with The Futurum Group and Splunk customer, REPAY - Realtime Electronic Payments, where we'll share how putting customer success at the center of your strategy drives real business outcomes.

See you there! 👀 https://splk.it/48RfUqt

Freut euch auf eine spannende LinkedIn Live-Diskussion zwischen Philipp Trinius (SVP Cyber Defense & Cloud Services, Deutsche Telekom Security GmbH) und Philipp Behre (Field CTO & Strategic Advisor, Splunk) zum Splunk Lagebericht Security 2025. 

Gemeinsam werfen sie einen Blick auf die wichtigsten Erkenntnisse aus dem Bericht und diskutieren, wie das Security Operations Center (SOC) der Zukunft aussieht.

Behind every great customer experience is a team of IT, security, and engineering pros making it all possible.

Ahead of #CXDay, we're highlighting how Splunk aligns services and products to help our customers achieve long-term success. Check it out. ➡️ https://splk.it/4h1Kksf

From the #PublicSector to Cisco's new security research team, Foundation AI.

Mick Baccio sat down with IT Brew at #splunkconf25 to discuss his career path from public to private sector and how he's helping shape Cisco + Splunk's newest agentic AI-powered security initiatives.

Catch the full profile here.👇

We love ending the week on a high note, and this certainly calls for a round of applause! 

Cheers to our amazing #SplunkPartners leaders who were named finalists for the 2025 CRN Women of the Year Awards! Click to learn more. #CRNWOTY

Next week, Boston becomes the center of the data universe with Splunk’s .conf25 (Sept 8–11). If you’re still on the fence, here are 10 reasons why this event is unmissable:

1. Step into the Agentic AI Era. Discover how AI is redefining security, resilience, and business outcomes.
2. Master Observability at scale. Go beyond dashboards and learn how to turn insights into instant action.
3. Future-proof your SOC. Dive into unified threat detection, automation, and AI-driven operations.
4. Get the inside scoop. Hear Splunk + Cisco’s joint product vision and the roadmap for digital resilience.
5. Choose your adventure. With hundreds of hands-on workshops, deep dives, and use cases, you create your learning journey.
6. Compete in Boss of the SOC. The ultimate blue-team challenge, celebrating 10 years of cybersecurity brilliance.
7. Level up your career. Certifications for just $25, proven to boost promotions and recognition.
8. Connect with visionaries. Network with global experts, engineers, and peers shaping the future of security and AI.
9. Celebrate with Weezer. Wrap up the week with live music, energy, and a ‘90s throwback you will not forget.
10. Be part of something bigger. From Splunkie Awards to innovation showcases, it is a celebration of the entire data community.

This is not just a conference. It is where learning, innovation, and community collide. I will be onsite capturing every moment, from keynotes to conversations that matter.

Best Part — You can also join virtually via the .conf25 Global Broadcast for keynotes and more —https://splk.it/4mLwtZa 

Ready. Set. Splunk. See you in Boston.

#splunkconf25 #SplunkSponsored #data #ai #theravitshow

Resilience—not speed—will decide who wins in the agentic AI era.

Agentic AI is reshaping business at a pace we’ve never seen before. Decisions, opportunities, and threats all arrive in real time. The organizations that thrive won’t just be the fastest—they’ll be the most resilient.

At the upcoming Splunk .conf25, resilience takes center stage as the ultimate differentiator for leaders navigating this era:

→ Data at scale: massive machine data, correlated in real time.
→ Agentic AI: systems that reason and respond, not just report.
→ Interoperability: agents collaborating seamlessly across domains.

For executives, this isn’t just a technical shift—it’s strategic. Resilience means safeguarding reputation, ensuring continuity, and turning volatility into advantage.

I’m excited about the visionary keynotes, AI innovations, and real customer stories that will spotlight what resilience looks like in action.

Want a front-row seat to this conversation? Join the global broadcast of .conf25.

Register Now: https://splk.it/4p3PxmX

#SplunkSponsored #splunkconf25 #AI #ArtificialIntelligence #AgenticAI #Enterprise #FutureOfAI #Innovation

"You look happier" 

Thanks! Just registered for #splunkconf25.

Psst, want to be this happy too? You're one click away. ➡️ https://splk.it/4oUrZRe

Résilience du Futur : l’humain et le collectif

Et si après tout, la résilience passait par l’humain et le collectif ? Déjà, parce que très souvent, le risque vient de l’individu. Surtout, parce qu'au-delà des technologies, des réglementations, c’est bien en agissant ensemble que l’on pourra résister et survivre aux nouvelles menaces.

The latest SharePoint exploits reveal a critical blind spot: malicious IIS modules that evade detection by mimicking legitimate extensions. Unlike script webshells, these DLL-based backdoors integrate deep into the web server pipeline and persist through patches and system updates.

Head to #SplunkBlogs for a full analysis from the Splunk Threat Research Team. 👇 #SplunkSecurity
company_updates.reshared_post_description:
It's been a long week for defenders dealing with the latest SharePoint RCE vulnerabilities.

You patched SharePoint. You ran AV scans. You rotated machine keys. You think you're safe from CVE-2025-53770?

Think again. 🚨

Storm-2603 is actively exploiting a blind spot most security teams miss: malicious IIS modules that persist through standard remediation.

📋 What teams typically do: 
✅ Apply Microsoft patches 
✅ Run malware scans 
✅ Rotate ASP.NET machine keys 
✅ Restart IIS services 
✅ Hunt for webshells

❌ What they DON'T do: Remove suspicious IIS DLLs loaded into w3wp.exe

💡 Why? Because touching IIS modules risks crashing production SharePoint/Exchange servers. Most security tools won't even scan them for the same reason.

⚠️ The result: Threat actors maintain persistence that survives patches, reboots, and traditional incident response.

🔍 Organizations need IIS module auditing NOW. Check your applicationHost.config and web.config files. Monitor Event ID 29 for new module installations.

Full technical analysis: https://lnkd.in/gryR-3y7 thanks to Michael H.

company_updates.description:
Résilience du Futur : les réglementations 

2025 est l’année de mise en vigueur de plusieurs réglementations autour des données, de la cybersécurité et de l’intelligence artificielle. On peut citer NIS2, DORA ou encore le CRA. Alors, les réglementations sont-elles une bonne chose pour la résilience ou bien un frein ?

Leadership must elevate observability tool rationalization from technical cleanup to a strategic priority. Executives who align on consolidation and embrace tough decisions can unify teams, optimize operations, and shift focus from maintenance to innovation. Combining governance with empathy, leaders turn rationalization into lasting digital resilience and business value.

Résilience du Futur : IA & Cybersécurité

L’intelligence artificielle fera partie intégrante de la cybersécurité, que ce soit pour renforcer les défenses ou se remettre plus rapidement d’un incident. Elle devra être pensée dès la conception des outils. Mais attention à bien garder la main sur les données qui la nourrissent.

Being a Solutions Engineer for Splunk  means benefiting from unparalleled visibility, game changing security, comprehensive observability while harnessing the power of AI, supercharged from Cisco.  You work with creative and talented individuals, empower customers to solve real business problems, every single day. Being a Solutions Engineer for Splunk  means that you can see the impact of your work in every customer interaction, every single day. Learn more from our very own David Lee!

If you’re ready to make an impact, our team is growing in the Americas! Find roles and apply here: https://lnkd.in/eNYb7BEy 
#SplunkLife
Résilience du Futur : une approche pragmatique de l’IA

Résilience du Futur : l’humain et le collectif

Et si après tout, la résilience passait par l’humain et le collectif ? Déjà, parce que très souvent, le risque vient de l’individu. Surtout, parce qu'au-delà des technologies, des réglementations, c’est bien en agissant ensemble que l’on pourra résister et survivre aux nouvelles menaces.

The latest SharePoint exploits reveal a critical blind spot: malicious IIS modules that evade detection by mimicking legitimate extensions. Unlike script webshells, these DLL-based backdoors integrate deep into the web server pipeline and persist through patches and system updates.

Head to #SplunkBlogs for a full analysis from the Splunk Threat Research Team. 👇 #SplunkSecurity

＜ウェビナー＞ 次世代SIEMのTDIRに求められる要件を満たすために開発されたEnteprise Security 8.0。昨今のセキュリティ脅威について振り返りながら、SOC業務の高度化・効率化のためにES8.0の新機能など。	詳細→	https://splk.it/4kZij5O
【Splunk Experience Day Tokyo 2025】 7/17(木) 開催！	詳細はこちら→	https://splk.it/3G8aeww
【Splunk Experience Day Tokyo 2025】AIガバナンスとセキュリティのリーダーが、AIの安全な利活用を支えるAIのためのセキュリティと、AI技術を活用したセキュリティの高度化について、双方の視点でディスカッションします。モデレータはSplunk Japan CTO 森 玄理です。	詳細はこちら→	https://splk.it/3Gbm1de

Résilience du Futur : l’humain et le collectif

Et si après tout, la résilience passait par l’humain et le collectif ? Déjà, parce que très souvent, le risque vient de l’individu. Surtout, parce qu'au-delà des technologies, des réglementations, c’est bien en agissant ensemble que l’on pourra résister et survivre aux nouvelles menaces.

The latest SharePoint exploits reveal a critical blind spot: malicious IIS modules that evade detection by mimicking legitimate extensions. Unlike script webshells, these DLL-based backdoors integrate deep into the web server pipeline and persist through patches and system updates.

Head to #SplunkBlogs for a full analysis from the Splunk Threat Research Team. 👇 #SplunkSecurity
company_updates.reshared_post_description:
It's been a long week for defenders dealing with the latest SharePoint RCE vulnerabilities.

You patched SharePoint. You ran AV scans. You rotated machine keys. You think you're safe from CVE-2025-53770?

Think again. 🚨

Storm-2603 is actively exploiting a blind spot most security teams miss: malicious IIS modules that persist through standard remediation.

📋 What teams typically do: 
✅ Apply Microsoft patches 
✅ Run malware scans 
✅ Rotate ASP.NET machine keys 
✅ Restart IIS services 
✅ Hunt for webshells

❌ What they DON'T do: Remove suspicious IIS DLLs loaded into w3wp.exe

💡 Why? Because touching IIS modules risks crashing production SharePoint/Exchange servers. Most security tools won't even scan them for the same reason.

⚠️ The result: Threat actors maintain persistence that survives patches, reboots, and traditional incident response.

🔍 Organizations need IIS module auditing NOW. Check your applicationHost.config and web.config files. Monitor Event ID 29 for new module installations.

Full technical analysis: https://lnkd.in/gryR-3y7 thanks to Michael H.

company_updates.description:
Résilience du Futur : les réglementations 

2025 est l’année de mise en vigueur de plusieurs réglementations autour des données, de la cybersécurité et de l’intelligence artificielle. On peut citer NIS2, DORA ou encore le CRA. Alors, les réglementations sont-elles une bonne chose pour la résilience ou bien un frein ?

Leadership must elevate observability tool rationalization from technical cleanup to a strategic priority. Executives who align on consolidation and embrace tough decisions can unify teams, optimize operations, and shift focus from maintenance to innovation. Combining governance with empathy, leaders turn rationalization into lasting digital resilience and business value.

Résilience du Futur : IA & Cybersécurité

L’intelligence artificielle fera partie intégrante de la cybersécurité, que ce soit pour renforcer les défenses ou se remettre plus rapidement d’un incident. Elle devra être pensée dès la conception des outils. Mais attention à bien garder la main sur les données qui la nourrissent.

Being a Solutions Engineer for Splunk  means benefiting from unparalleled visibility, game changing security, comprehensive observability while harnessing the power of AI, supercharged from Cisco.  You work with creative and talented individuals, empower customers to solve real business problems, every single day. Being a Solutions Engineer for Splunk  means that you can see the impact of your work in every customer interaction, every single day. Learn more from our very own David Lee!

If you’re ready to make an impact, our team is growing in the Americas! Find roles and apply here: https://lnkd.in/eNYb7BEy
